case_title: SAM ZHAO KANG LIANG VS. LARRY LAM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIANG, SAM ZHAO KANG AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, LARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2019 BY JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF SAM ZHAO KANG LIANG IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN COURT CERTIFIED INTERPERTER AIDONG NI. CHRISTY TAM, WIFE TESTIFIES ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT LARRY LAM IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWD AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT.. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, SAM ZHAO KANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, LARRY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, LARRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00 - SERVED AUG-17-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, LARRY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.
